name: Pork & Pineapple Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1 Red/green/yellow pepper, seeded and finely chopped (may use a comb of 3 peppers)
8 oz Canned pineapple, in natural juice, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the ground pork, scallions, pepper, bread crumbs, salt, and pepper.
3. Mix in the eggs, pineapple juice, flour, water, and dry bread crumbs until well combined.
4. Form the mixture into meatballs about 1 inch in diameter.
5. Place the meatballs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the meatballs are cooked through and golden brown.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
